entry.data:
CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 40S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 40
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
